title: UX Research Toolkit — Scenes Layer
description: Layer schema extending each phase with storyboard scene data. Each phase maps to a visual frame in a narrative comic-style sequence capturing the story of the user experience.

scene_description.description: What is happening in this storyboard frame. The action, event, or key moment being illustrated.
examples: María intenta registrarse en la app pero el formulario le pide demasiados datos

scene_setting.description: Where and/or when this scene takes place. Provides spatial and temporal context for the frame.
examples: Cocina de su apartamento, martes por la mañana, antes de ir al trabajo

scene_dialogue.description: Any speech or thought bubbles appearing in this frame. Direct quotes, internal monologue, or exclamations.
examples: ¿Por qué me piden mi número de pasaporte para registrarme?

scene_mood.description: The overall emotional atmosphere or tone of the scene. Describes how the scene feels visually and emotionally.
